purpose: Deterministic release provenance registry. Records canonical release provenance entries for replay prevention and release legitimacy verification. Closes RPM-019 (provenance_replay) and RPM-020 (attestation_mismatch) from release_provenance_matrix.json. Evidence only — no runtime route changes, no authority creation, no deployment capability expansion, no proof behavior changes.
scope: release provenance enforcement and replay prevention only

replay_prevention_rules.description: same tag → different artifact hash → release_artifact_hash_mismatch
same commit + same tag → different artifact hash without new release_id → release_artifact_hash_mismatch
same preo_reference + same release_tag → different artifact hash → release_attestation_mismatch
artifact hash mismatch at verification time → release_artifact_hash_mismatch

governance_invariants.statement: release provenance registry entries are evidence-only and cannot create authority
BREAK_GLASS registry entries must never have canonical_release_candidate=true
replay prevention rules must be enforced before any entry is accepted as CANONICAL_RELEASE_CANDIDATE
rollback releases must preserve full provenance requirements and reference prior canonical release lineage

entry_schema.source_commit_sha: string — 40-character hex SHA of the tagged commit
entry_schema.artifact_hash: string — SHA-256 hex of the release artifact checksum file
entry_schema.pr_number: number | null — merged PR number that introduced the commit
entry_schema.status_check_refs: array — [{check_name, run_id, conclusion}] for required status checks
entry_schema.preo_reference: string | null — PREO artifact reference e.g. PREO-<pr>-<sha>
entry_schema.sco_reference: string | null — SCO artifact reference e.g. SCO-<pr>-<sha>
entry_schema.evidence_only: true — always; release provenance records are evidence, not authority grants
entry_schema.creates_authority: false — always; tag creation and provenance recording create no MindShift authority
entry_schema.creates_execution: false — always; release provenance does not authorize execution
entry_schema.canonical_release_candidate: boolean — true only if all boundary steps satisfied and no replay detected
entry_schema.break_glass: boolean — true if admin override path was invoked
entry_schema.break_glass_justification: string | null — required when break_glass=true, documents override reason
entry_schema.workflow_run_id: string — GitHub Actions run ID that generated this entry
entry_schema.workflow_ref: string — GitHub workflow ref that generated this entry
